quotes.quote1: Educaption helped me understand my options when I was confused about which engineering branch to choose. The cutoff calculator was accurate!
quotes.quote2: The counselling guide was a lifesaver during TNEA. I could track all important dates and documents in one place.
quotes.quote3: As a parent, I found this website very helpful to understand the admission process and guide my daughter.

counselling.title: Counselling Guide
counselling.subtitle: Complete information about the admission counselling process
counselling.infoText: TNEA counselling is conducted annually by Anna University. Make sure to keep all required documents ready before the counselling dates.

about.title: About Educaption
about.subtitle: Helping Tamil Nadu students make informed decisions about their higher education
about.aboutText: Educaption is a comprehensive platform designed to help students in Tamil Nadu navigate the complex admission process. Our tools help you calculate your cutoff marks, explore available courses and colleges, and prepare for the counselling process.
about.missionText: We are committed to making higher education accessible and transparent for all students:
about.mission1: Provide accurate cutoff calculations based on official formulas
about.mission2: Offer comprehensive information about courses and colleges
about.mission3: Guide students through the counselling process step by step
about.mission4: Support both English and Tamil speaking students
about.contactText: Have questions or feedback? We would love to hear from you.

footer.tagline: Helping Tamil Nadu students find their path to higher education.
